content.en:
The moment the Haihe Controller saw the Snow Maiden Controller, his body froze, and his heart was filled with endless despair.

This is the Snow Maiden Controller, all of them are top-notch existences in the Origin Realm Sea, and they are Nine Realm-level controller-level existences, even if they are the sect leader of the Futian Sect, they are not the opponents of the Snow Maiden Masters now!

"The attack failed, you should flee as soon as possible!"

The Haihe Ruler regretted.

Now, he had no hope of escaping.

Airplanes!

The body of the master of the sea river was frozen in ice, and he almost had no ability to react, so he was frozen by the snow girl's controller, and immediately turned into a Xiaoice ball and landed in the palm of the snow girl.

At this time.

Ye Tian and the other Eternal Controllers were shocked.

This is a Seven Realms-level master, who is a top powerhouse in the Origin Realm Sea, but now he has been caught by the Snow Maiden controller like an ant.

At this moment, many Eternal Masters can be regarded as seeing the strength of the Snow Maiden Controller for the first time, it is so terrifying!

"Thank you, Fourth Senior Sister!"

Ye Tian thanked.

"Little junior brother, I'm going to find you Senior Brother Black Decay, he is very good at studying the will of the soul, and he can directly absorb his memory fragments and find out the other party's lair. "

Snow Maiden said.

"Then it's going to trouble the fourth senior sister!"

Ye Tian arched his hand.

Airplanes!!!!

The fourth senior sister tore through time and space and left, heading to another part of the Origin Realm Sea to find the Black Decay Master.

The Black Decay Controller is the most powerful disciple under the command of the Ten Elements Ancestor, and he is already a Ten Realm-level Master.

If it was a small matter like the Futian Sect, it would definitely not be able to attract his attention.

But on this day, the Snow Girl personally came to him for help, and he naturally wouldn't fail to help.

Black Decay Mountain.

"Senior Brother Black Decay, this time I would like you to analyze his memory fragment, this is a Seven Realms level master, so only you can parse his memory fragment. Snow Maiden pleaded.

"Senior sister, it's just a Seven Realms level controller, why are you analyzing his memory fragments, could it be that this guy has an unusual background?"

Black Decay asked.

Immediately, the Snow Maiden told the matter of the Futian Sect.

"Heaven-reviving sect, heaven-grabbing technique, I didn't expect this secret technique to still exist. Black Decay muttered.

"There are many eternal masters of this secret art, even if the Futian Sect is exterminated this time, there will be another Futian Sect or the Heaven Devouring Sect in the future. Snow Girl said with a smile.

"If you want me to say, just destroy the Black Ancestor directly, the Heaven Snatching Technique is what he did, this guy wants to find another way, so as to break the shackles of the Ten Realm-level controllers. The Heaven Swallowing Sect is an experiment he has set up, and he is the real master. However, this guy Heizu is indeed terrifying, more than a thousand Dao, all of which have mastered hundreds of millions of changes, if it weren't for the Heaven Snatching Technique, there would really be no way to master so many Dao changes. In terms of strength, he was indeed invincible at the level of the Ten Realms, and if it weren't for the Primordial Ancestor's level attack, he really wouldn't be able to defeat him. "Black Decay Road.

"Senior Brother Black Decay, I remember that you fought against Black Ancestor at the beginning, right?"

Snow Girl asked.

"Well, that was a long time ago, when I was just entering the Ten Realms level, I fought against him, and I was defeated by him in three moves. But now, in terms of strength, I'm not necessarily much weaker than him. The Black Decay Controller said confidently.

The Snow Girl said again: "Senior brother, the Black Ancestor should practice a relatively perfect Heaven Capture Technique, and the ones that have been circulated are all Heaven Capture Techniques with great side effects. But even so, Black Ancestor's lifespan was also affected, after all, he devoured a lot of Eternal Controllers, and was disgusted by the Origin Realm Sea, and now that he counted, his lifespan was probably not much. "

"It shouldn't be much, but he can't get out now, how can he come out of the Primordial Ancestor's seal? But he was sealed, and he couldn't do it in cultivation, so how could he have a chance to escape. The Black Rotten Ruler said.

"Senior Brother Black Decay, let's not talk about this for now, let's deal with the Futian Sect, this kind of force is a scourge. "

The Snow Maiden said.

"Good!"

The Black Decay Controller took the frozen crystal of the Haihe Controller, and immediately grabbed it, and countless black breaths were grabbed from the soul will of the Haihe Controller.

Suddenly, countless fragments of memories were presented, and they could not be hidden at all.

Even the memory of making the oath could not be hidden, and the many changes in the way of the oath could not stop the power of the black decay controller at all, and they collapsed one after another, but the memory was not damaged.

Soon.

All the memories of the Haihe Masters have been stripped away by the Black Decay Masters.

The Black Decay Controller only absorbs useful information, and all other memories are erased.

"I found it, the Futian Sect does not have a headquarters in the strict sense, it is a relatively idle organization, only a temporary base. Now, their temporary base is located in an Eternal Realm on River Twenty-Three, which has been transformed to allow unrestricted access to Eternal Masters elsewhere. Moreover, the Haihe Ruler is one of the Deputy Sect Leaders of the Futian Sect, and he knows all the information of the other members, even the information of the Sect Master, so I will pass it on to you. "

The Black Rotten Controller passed all the information to the Snow Maiden, and he didn't care.

After all, in his opinion, a group of the strongest people only had the power of the Eight Realms Controllers, and they were not qualified to let him make a move.

Although in the memory of the Haihe master, the Futian Sect still has some good things, but it is not of much value to him, and he does not look down on it.

"Thank you, Senior Brother Black Decay!"

After receiving the news, the Snow Maiden killed the master of the Haihe River and left the Black Decay Mountain.

......

"Fourth Senior Sister!"

When Ye Tian saw that the Snow Girl was back, he knew that the matter should be almost settled.

"Found the temporary base of the Resurrection Sect, as well as all the member information, for you. "

The Snow Girl passed the information to Ye Tian.

After Ye Tian received the information, he said, "Fourth Senior Sister, to exterminate the Futian Sect, I still have to take action, I can't beat the Eight Realms-level controllers." "

"That's natural, but I can't do it in vain, after destroying the Futian Sect, the treasures obtained will have to be selected by me first. Snow Maiden said.

Although Senior Brother Black Decay doesn't look down on the treasures of the Futian Sect, she does!

According to the information, the leader of the Futian Sect has a lot of good things, such as a statue of Ten Thousand Phases, and there are several treasures that are more precious than the statue of Ten Thousand Phases.

This time it was just a casual thing, and there were some gains, and she was naturally happy.

"That's nature!"

Ye Tian nodded.
